acquisition method: The Orbitrap mass spectrometer was operated in data-dependent mode
cleavage agent: digested overnight with trypsin at 1:50 enzyme to substrate ratio
enrichment method: Samples were affinity isolated with either cetuximab-AF647 or anti CA19-9 Ab-AF647
instrument: Data was acquired on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos
reduction reagent: Proteins were reduced with 5 mM TCEP
reduction concentration: Proteins were reduced with 5 mM TCEP
